issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive/when becomes rested), not 'OnBlock'. 'When this Character becomes rested' is a passive trigger, not tied to blocking.
Missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' — text '[Your Turn]' requires this duration constraint, not permanent.
Trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive conditional), not 'Activated'. This is a passive ability that checks if rested during opponent's turn.
Condition should check 'HasRestingDon' or similar state (rested status), not 'Always'. The effect only applies 'If this Character is rested'.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Text '[Opponent's Turn]' indicates the effect applies during opponent's turn phase.
